docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PUR TO STIPUALTION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $155.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO SOPHIA MAGEE ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DEMARCUS A. SMITH. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOTISION: $622.00 US CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
